testcase.name: test_scheduler_status_contains_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing server_time field assert 'server_time' in {'scheduler_interval': '5 minutes', 'scheduler_running': True, 'server_time_utc': '2026-02-03T15:57:24.949318+00:00', 'upcoming_events': []}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_scheduler_reminders.py:70: in test_scheduler_status_contains_required_fields assert "server_time" in data, "Missing server_time field" E AssertionError: Missing server_time field E assert 'server_time' in {'scheduler_interval': '5 minutes', 'scheduler_running': True, 'server_time_utc': '2026-02-03T15:57:24.949318+00:00', 'upcoming_events': []}

testcase.name: test_iso_format_with_z_suffix
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_scheduler_reminders.py:336: in test_iso_format_with_z_suffix assert get_response.status_code == 200 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scheduler_status_shows_server_time

failure.message: AssertionError: server_time should not be None assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_scheduler_reminders.py:424: in test_scheduler_status_shows_server_time assert server_time is not None, "server_time should not be None" E AssertionError: server_time should not be None E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_scheduler_status_shows_time_windows

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing time_windows in response assert 'time_windows' in {'scheduler_interval': '5 minutes', 'scheduler_running': True, 'server_time_utc': '2026-02-03T15:57:39.845234+00:00', 'upcoming_events': []}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_scheduler_reminders.py:441: in test_scheduler_status_shows_time_windows assert "time_windows" in data, "Missing time_windows in response" E AssertionError: Missing time_windows in response E assert 'time_windows' in {'scheduler_interval': '5 minutes', 'scheduler_running': True, 'server_time_utc': '2026-02-03T15:57:39.845234+00:00', 'upcoming_events': []}
